title: pelargonium plicatum
intro: Pelargonium plicatum, also known as the plaited geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the Geraniaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy for colds, flu, and other minor ailments. Pelargonium plicatum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be found in various forms of supplements and skincare products.
